qnalist.question: What does your AI platform do?
qnalist.answer: Our platform streamlines the entire lifecycle of M&A and divestitures with AI-driven workflows, actionable insights, and real-time analytics—purpose-built for Private Equity, Healthcare, Pharma, and LifeSciences sectors.

qnalist.question: Is the platform customizable for my industry or business model?
qnalist.answer: Absolutely. The platform is modular, highly customizable, and built to scale across varied workflows—clinical, financial, compliance, or operational.

qnalist.question: Who can benefit from your solutions?
qnalist.answer: Private Equity firms, Healthcare Payers & Providers, Life Sciences and Pharma companies looking to optimize due diligence, deal execution, claims intelligence, and post-merger integration.

qnalist.question: How secure is your platform?
qnalist.answer: We comply with global standards such as HIPAA, SOC 2, GDPR, ISO 27001, and 21 CFR Part 11. Your data is encrypted at rest and in transit.

qnalist.question: Do you support data residency requirements?
qnalist.answer: Yes, our infrastructure allows you to choose data residency by region (U.S., EU, APAC) based on regulatory and business needs.

qnalist.question: Can your platform integrate with our existing systems?
qnalist.answer: Yes. We offer robust APIs, prebuilt connectors, and integration guides for systems like EHRs, ERPs, CRMs, financial tools, and CDMOs.

qnalist.question: What technologies power your platform?
qnalist.answer: We leverage GenAI, NLP, large language models (LLMs), and industry-specific AI pipelines. Deployment options include SaaS, on-prem, and hybrid.

qnalist.question: How can I sign up for beta testing?
qnalist.answer: You can apply via our Beta Testing Program section. Selected users receive early access, direct support, and influence over product roadmap.

qnalist.question: Is there a free trial available?
qnalist.answer: Yes, we offer a Pilot Trial with full access to core features. Schedule a demo to explore eligibility.

qnalist.question: How does this help with divestitures or M&A?
qnalist.answer: From intelligent due diligence to compliance tracking and synergy analytics, our platform offers end-to-end support for faster, smarter deal outcomes.

qnalist.question: How does this support healthcare or pharma or Life Sciences-specific needs?
qnalist.answer: We handle everything from claims lifecycle automation to clinical data intelligence, regulatory compliance, and AI-enhanced manufacturing insights.

qnalist.question: How is the platform priced?
qnalist.answer: We offer flexible, usage-based licensing models based on your company size, use case, and deployment preference. Contact sales for custom pricing.

qnalist.question: What kind of customer support do you offer?
qnalist.answer: We offer 24/7 support, a dedicated customer success team, ticketing system, and a self-service Help Center.

qnalist.question: Where can I find documentation?
qnalist.answer: Visit our Developer Portal and Trust Center for integration docs, API references, compliance details, and release notes.
